case h
a : Type
p : a → Bool
sl : Chapter3.SymList a
lhs rhs : List a
ok :
  (lhs.isEmpty = true → rhs.isEmpty = true ∨ rhs.length = 1) ∧
    (rhs.isEmpty = true → lhs.isEmpty = true ∨ lhs.length = 1)
⊢ dropWhile p (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok)) =
    Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.dropWhileSL a p (Chapter3.SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok))

generalize hsl : SymList.mk lhs rhs ok = sl'
  have hlen : lengthSL sl' = lhs.length + rhs.length := by simp [← hsl, lengthSL]
  clear ok hsl
  induction sl' using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl hempty =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, hempty, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
    have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hempty
    simp [List.isEmpty_iff] at h1 h2
    simp [h1, h2]
  | case2 sl hne hnone =>
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hnone
    simp [hnone, dropWhileSL, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
  | case3 sl hne hsome hsl hp ih =>
    simp only [dropWhileSL, hne, ↓reduceIte, hsome]
    simp only [hp, ↓reduceIte]
    rw [← ih]
    have hfromSL : fromSL (tailSL sl) = (fromSL sl).tail := by
      have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
      cases xs with
      | nil =>
        simp at ok
        cases ys with
        | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
        | cons b bs =>
          simp at ok
          simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil, ok]
      | cons a as =>
        cases ys with
        | nil =>
          by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
        | cons b bs =>
          by_cases h: as = []
          · simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
          · simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]
    rw [hfromSL]
    have hhead : headSL sl = (fromSL sl).head? := by
      have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
      simp [headSL, fromSL]
      split <;> rename_i h <;> simp at h
      · have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := h; subst ha hb; simp
      · simp [ok, h.1, h.2]
    rw [hsome] at hhead
    cases hfsl : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp at hhead
    | cons x xs =>
      simp at hhead
      subst hhead
      simp [dropWhile, hp]
  | case4 sl hne hsome hsl hnp =>
    simp only [dropWhileSL, hne, ↓reduceIte, hsome, hnp]
    have hhead : headSL sl = (fromSL sl).head? := by
      have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
      simp [headSL, fromSL]
      split <;> rename_i h <;> simp at h
      · have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := h; subst ha hb; simp
      · simp [ok, h.1, h.2]
    rw [hsome] at hhead
    cases hfsl : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp at hhead
    | cons x xs =>
      simp at hhead
      subst hhead
      simp [dropWhile, hnp]

induction lhs, rhs, ok using SymList.dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | _ lhs rhs ok h => simp [dropWhileSL, h, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
  | _ lhs rhs ok h1 h2 => simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, nil, fromSL, dropWhile, headSL]
  | _ lhs rhs ok h1 h2 h3 ih =>
    simp only [dropWhileSL, h1, ↓reduceIte, h2, h3]
    rw [← ih]
    simp [fromSL, headSL, dropWhile] at h2 h3 ⊢
    split at h2 <;> simp at h2 h3 ⊢ <;> simp [h3, tailSL, fromSL, splitInTwoSL]
  | _ lhs rhs ok h1 h2 h3 =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3, fromSL, headSL, dropWhile]
    split at h2 <;> simp at h2 h3 ⊢ <;> simp [h3]

generalize hsl : SymList.mk lhs rhs ok = sl'
  induction sl' using (measure_wf (fun s => lengthSL s)).wf.induction with
  | _ sl ih =>
    unfold dropWhileSL
    simp
    by_cases he : sl.lhs.isEmpty ∧ sl.rhs.isEmpty
    · simp [he, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
      have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := he
      simp [List.isEmpty_iff] at h1 h2
      simp [h1, h2]
    · simp [he]
      cases hh : headSL sl with
      | none =>
        rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hh
        simp [hh, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
      | some hd =>
        by_cases hp : p hd
        · simp [hp]
          have hne : sl ≠ nil := by
            intro heq
            rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at heq
            rw [heq] at hh
            contradiction
          have hlt : lengthSL (tailSL sl) < lengthSL sl := length_tail_lt_length sl hne
          specialize ih (tailSL sl) hlt
          rw [← ih]
          have heq : fromSL (tailSL sl) = tail (fromSL sl) := by
            have ⟨xs, ys, ok'⟩ := sl
            cases xs with
            | nil =>
              induction ys with
              | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
              | cons b bs _ =>
                simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]
                simp at ok'
                rw [ok']
                simp
            | cons a as =>
              induction ys with
              | nil =>
                by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
              | cons b bs _ =>
                by_cases h: as = []
                · simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
                · simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]
          rw [heq]
          have hfs : (fromSL sl).head? = some hd := by
            have : List.head? ∘ fromSL = @headSL a := by
              funext sl'
              have ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩ := sl'
              simp [Function.comp, headSL, fromSL]
              split <;> (rename_i h'; simp at h'; have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := h'; subst ha hb; simp)
              simp at ok'; simp [ok']
            have := congrFun this sl
            simp [Function.comp] at this
            rw [this, hh]
          cases hfs' : fromSL sl with
          | nil => simp at hfs
          | cons x xs =>
            simp at hfs
            simp [hfs, hp, dropWhile]
        · simp [hp]
          have hfs : (fromSL sl).head? = some hd := by
            have : List.head? ∘ fromSL = @headSL a := by
              funext sl'
              have ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩ := sl'
              simp [Function.comp, headSL, fromSL]
              split <;> (rename_i h'; simp at h'; have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := h'; subst ha hb; simp)
              simp at ok'; simp [ok']
            have := congrFun this sl
            simp [Function.comp] at this
            rw [this, hh]
          cases hfs' : fromSL sl with
          | nil => simp at hfs
          | cons x xs =>
            simp at hfs
            simp [hfs, hp, dropWhile, hfs']

generalize hsl : SymList.mk lhs rhs ok = sl'
  induction sl' using (measure_wf lengthSL).wf.recursion generalizing lhs rhs with
  | _ sl' ih =>
    unfold dropWhileSL
    simp only
    by_cases hempty : sl'.lhs.isEmpty ∧ sl'.rhs.isEmpty
    · simp [hempty, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
      have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hempty
      simp [List.isEmpty_iff] at h1 h2
      simp [h1, h2]
    · simp [hempty]
      cases hhead : headSL sl' with
      | none =>
        rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hhead
        rw [hhead] at hempty
        simp [nil] at hempty
      | some hsl =>
        by_cases hp : p hsl
        · simp [hp]
          have hne : sl' ≠ nil := by
            intro heq
            rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at heq
            rw [heq] at hhead
            contradiction
          have hlt : lengthSL (tailSL sl') < lengthSL sl' := length_tail_lt_length sl' hne
          have ih' := ih (tailSL sl') hlt (tailSL sl').lhs (tailSL sl').rhs (tailSL sl').ok rfl
          rw [← ih']
          have heq : fromSL sl' = hsl :: fromSL (tailSL sl') := by
            have htail : tail (fromSL sl') = fromSL (tailSL sl') := by
              have ⟨xs, ys, ok'⟩ := sl'
              cases xs with
              | nil =>
                induction ys with
                | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
                | cons b bs _ =>
                  simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]
                  simp at ok'
                  rw [ok']
                  rfl
              | cons a as =>
                cases ys with
                | nil =>
                  by_cases h : as = []
                  · simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
                  · simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]
                | cons b bs =>
                  by_cases h: as = []
                  · simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
                  · simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]
            have hhead' : List.head? (fromSL sl') = some hsl := by
              have : List.head? ∘ fromSL = @headSL a := by
                funext sl''
                have ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩ := sl''
                simp [Function.comp, headSL, fromSL]
                split <;> (rename_i h; simp at h; have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := h; subst ha hb; simp)
                simp at ok'
                simp [ok']
              rw [← Function.comp_apply (f := List.head?), this, hhead]
            cases hfrom : fromSL sl' with
            | nil => simp at hhead'
            | cons x xs =>
              simp at hhead'
              rw [hhead']
              congr
              rw [← htail, hfrom]
          rw [heq, dropWhile, hp]
        · simp [hp]

induction sl using (measure lengthSL).wf.induction with
  | ind sl ih =>
    have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
    unfold dropWhileSL
    simp only
    by_cases hemp : lhs.isEmpty ∧ rhs.isEmpty
    · simp [hemp, fromSL, nil, dropWhile]
      have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hemp
      simp at h1 h2
      simp [h1, h2]
    · simp [hemp]
      cases hhead : headSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ with
      | none =>
        rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hhead
        simp [nil] at hhead
        have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hhead
        simp [h1, h2] at hemp
      | some hsl =>
        by_cases hp : p hsl
        · simp [hp]
          have hne : ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ ≠ nil := by
            intro hc
            rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hc
            rw [hc] at hhead
            contradiction
          have hlt : lengthSL (tailSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) < lengthSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ :=
            length_tail_lt_length ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ hne
          have ih' := ih (tailSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) hlt
          rw [← ih']
          have htail : fromSL (tailSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) = tail (fromSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) := by
            have h := congrFun (congrArg fromSL rfl) (tailSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩)
            simp [fromSL, tailSL]
            cases lhs with
            | nil =>
              simp at ok
              cases rhs with
              | nil => simp [nil]
              | cons b bs =>
                simp at ok
                simp [ok, nil, splitInTwoSL]
            | cons a as =>
              by_cases h : as = []
              · simp [h, splitInTwoSL]
              · simp [h]
          rw [htail]
          simp [fromSL] at hhead
          cases lhs with
          | nil =>
            simp at ok
            cases rhs with
            | nil => simp at hhead
            | cons b bs =>
              simp at ok hhead
              simp [ok, hhead, hp, dropWhile]
          | cons a as =>
            simp at hhead
            simp [hhead, hp, dropWhile]
        · simp [hp]

conv_rhs => unfold dropWhileSL
    simp
    by_cases hempty : lhs.isEmpty ∧ rhs.isEmpty
    · simp [hempty, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
    · simp [hempty]
      cases hhead : headSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ with
      | none =>
        rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hhead
        unfold nil at hhead; simp at hhead
        simp [hhead.1, hhead.2] at hempty
      | some hsl =>
        simp
        by_cases hp : p hsl
        · simp [hp]
          have hne : (⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ : SymList a) ≠ nil := by
            intro hnil; rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hnil
            rw [hnil] at hhead; contradiction
          have := ih (tailSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) (length_tail_lt_length _ hne)
          simp [Function.comp] at this
          rw [← this]
          cases lhs with
          | nil =>
            simp at hempty ok
            have y :: [] := rhs
            simp [headSL] at hhead; subst hhead
            simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp, tailSL, nil]
          | cons x xs =>
            simp [headSL] at hhead; subst hhead
            simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp, tailSL]
            split <;> simp [fromSL, splitInTwoSL]
        · simp [hp, fromSL]
          cases lhs with
          | nil =>
            simp at hempty ok
            have y :: [] := rhs
            simp [headSL] at hhead; subst hhead
            simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp]
          | cons x xs =>
            simp [headSL] at hhead; subst hhead
            simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp]

unfold dropWhileSL
  simp
  split
  · rename_i h
    simp at h
    have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := h
    subst hl hr
    simp [fromSL, nil, Chapter1.dropWhile]
  · split
    · rename_i h1 h2
      simp at h1
      push_neg at h1
      unfold headSL at h2
      split at h2 <;> simp at h2
      rename_i heq
      have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := heq
      subst hl hr
      simp at h1
    · split
      · rename_i h1 h2 hsl hp
        have := length_tail_lt_length (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok) (by
          simp only [ne_eq]
          intro heq
          rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at heq
          rw [heq] at h2
          simp at h2)
        conv_lhs => rw [show fromSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok) = headSL! (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok) :: fromSL (tailSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok)) by
          unfold headSL! fromSL tailSL
          simp at h1
          push_neg at h1
          cases lhs with
          | nil =>
            simp at ok
            cases rhs with
            | nil => simp at h1
            | cons y ys =>
              simp at ok
              subst ok
              simp [nil]
          | cons x xs =>
            by_cases hxs : xs = []
            · subst hxs
              simp [splitInTwoSL]
            · simp [hxs]]
        unfold headSL at h2
        split at h2 <;> try simp at h2
        · rename_i heq
          have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := heq
          subst hl hr
          simp at h1
        · rename_i y ys heq
          simp at heq
          have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := heq
          subst hl hr
          simp at ok
          subst ok
          simp [headSL!, Chapter1.dropWhile, hp, h2]
          rfl
        · rename_i x xs ys heq
          simp at heq
          have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := heq
          subst hl hr
          simp [headSL!, Chapter1.dropWhile, hp, h2]
          rfl
      · rename_i h1 h2 hsl hp
        unfold headSL at h2
        split at h2 <;> try simp at h2
        · rename_i heq
          have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := heq
          subst hl hr
          simp at h1
        · rename_i y ys heq
          simp at heq
          have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := heq
          subst hl hr
          simp at ok
          subst ok
          simp [fromSL, Chapter1.dropWhile, hp, h2]
        · rename_i x xs ys heq
          simp at heq
          have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := heq
          subst hl hr
          simp [fromSL, Chapter1.dropWhile, hp, h2]

induction lhs, rhs, ok using SymList.dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 h => simp [dropWhileSL, h, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
  | case2 h1 h2 => simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
  | case3 sl h1 h2 h3 ih =>
    simp only [dropWhileSL, h1, ↓reduceIte, h2, h3]
    simp [fromSL, headSL] at h2
    split at h2 <;> simp at h2
    simp [fromSL, dropWhile, h3, ih]
  | case4 sl h1 h2 h3 => simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3, fromSL, dropWhile]

generalize hsl : (⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ : SymList a) = sl' at *
  induction sl' using (measure_wf (fun s => lengthSL s)).wf.induction generalizing lhs rhs with
  | _ sl' ih =>
    conv_rhs => rw [dropWhileSL]
    simp only
    by_cases hemp : sl'.lhs.isEmpty ∧ sl'.rhs.isEmpty
    · obtain ⟨hl, hr⟩ := hemp
      simp only [hl, hr, and_self, ↓reduceIte, fromSL, nil]
      simp [List.isEmpty_iff] at hl hr
      simp [hl, hr, dropWhile]
    · simp only [hemp, ↓reduceIte]
      cases hhead : headSL sl' with
      | none => simp [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hhead; simp [hhead, nil] at hemp
      | some x =>
        by_cases hp : p x <;> simp only [hp, ↓reduceIte]
        · have hne : sl' ≠ nil := by intro h; rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h; simp [h] at hhead
          have := length_tail_lt_length sl' hne
          rw [← ih (tailSL sl') this rfl]
          have := congrArg fromSL (congrArg tailSL hsl.symm)
          simp at this
          conv_lhs => rw [← this]
          clear this
          have htail : fromSL (tailSL sl') = tail (fromSL sl') := by
            have ⟨xs, ys, ok'⟩ := sl'
            cases xs with
            | nil => simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil] at *; simp at ok'; simp [ok']
            | cons a as =>
              by_cases has : as = []
              · simp [has, tailSL, splitInTwoSL, fromSL]
              · simp [tailSL, has, fromSL]
          rw [htail]
          have hfromhead : (fromSL sl').head? = some x := by
            have := congrArg headSL hsl.symm
            simp at this
            rw [← this] at hhead
            have : List.head? ∘ fromSL = @headSL a := by
              funext s; have ⟨l, r, o⟩ := s; simp [Function.comp, headSL, fromSL]
              split <;> (rename_i h; simp at h; have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := h; subst ha hb; simp)
              simp at o; simp [o]
            have := congrFun this ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
            simp [Function.comp] at this
            rw [this, hhead]
          cases hfsl : fromSL sl' with
          | nil => simp at hfromhead
          | cons y ys => simp at hfromhead; simp [hfromhead, dropWhile, hp]
        · rfl

unfold dropWhileSL
  simp
  split
  · rename_i h
    simp at h
    have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := h
    simp [hl, hr, fromSL, nil, dropWhile]
  · split
    · rename_i h1 h2
      simp at h1
      push_neg at h1
      simp [headSL] at h2
      split at h2
      · rename_i heq
        simp at heq
        have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := heq
        subst ha hb
        simp at h1
      · contradiction
      · contradiction
    · rename_i h1 hsl
      split
      · rename_i hp
        simp [fromSL, headSL] at hsl
        split at hsl
        · rename_i heq
          simp at heq
          have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := heq
          subst ha hb
          simp at h1
        · rename_i heq
          simp at heq ok
          have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := heq
          subst ha
          have y :: [] := rhs
          simp at hsl
          subst hsl
          simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp, tailSL, nil, splitInTwoSL]
        · rename_i x xs heq
          simp at hsl
          subst hsl
          simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp, tailSL]
          by_cases hxs : xs = []
          · subst hxs
            simp [splitInTwoSL, fromSL]
          · simp [hxs, fromSL]
            rfl
      · rename_i hp
        simp [fromSL, headSL] at hsl
        split at hsl
        · rename_i heq
          simp at heq
          have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := heq
          subst ha hb
          simp at h1
        · rename_i heq
          simp at heq ok
          have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := heq
          subst ha
          have y :: [] := rhs
          simp at hsl
          subst hsl
          simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp]
        · rename_i x xs heq
          simp at hsl
          subst hsl
          simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp]

induction sl using (measure_wf (fun s => lengthSL s)).wf.recursion with
  | _ sl ih =>
    have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
    unfold dropWhileSL
    simp only
    by_cases hempty : lhs.isEmpty ∧ rhs.isEmpty
    · simp [hempty, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
      obtain ⟨hl, hr⟩ := hempty
      simp [List.isEmpty_iff] at hl hr
      simp [hl, hr]
    · simp [hempty]
      cases hhead : headSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ with
      | none =>
        simp [nil, fromSL]
        rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hhead
        unfold nil at hhead
        simp at hhead
        obtain ⟨hl, hr⟩ := hhead
        simp [hl, hr, dropWhile]
      | some hsl =>
        by_cases hp : p hsl
        · simp [hp]
          have hne : ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ ≠ nil := by
            intro heq
            rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at heq
            rw [heq] at hhead
            contradiction
          have hlt : lengthSL (tailSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) < lengthSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ :=
            length_tail_lt_length ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ hne
          rw [← ih (tailSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) hlt]
          conv_lhs => rw [← tail (fromSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩)]
          congr 1
          · have : fromSL (tailSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) = tail (fromSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) := by
              exact (fun as => rfl) ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
            rw [this]
            simp only [headSL, fromSL] at hhead
            split at hhead <;> simp at hhead
            · rename_i h
              simp at h
              obtain ⟨hl, hr⟩ := h
              simp [hl, hr]
            · rename_i h
              simp at h
              obtain ⟨hl, hr⟩ := h
              simp [fromSL, hl]
              rw [dropWhile]
              simp [← hhead, hp]
            · simp [fromSL]
              rw [dropWhile]
              simp [← hhead, hp]
          · rfl
        · simp [hp, fromSL]
          simp only [headSL, fromSL] at hhead
          split at hhead <;> simp at hhead
          · rename_i h; simp at h; obtain ⟨hl, hr⟩ := h; simp [hl, hr, dropWhile]
          · rename_i h; simp at h; obtain ⟨hl, hr⟩ := h
            simp [hl]
            have : rhs = [hsl] := by simp at ok; exact ok
            simp [this, dropWhile, ← hhead, hp]
          · rename_i x xs
            simp [dropWhile, ← hhead, hp]

unfold dropWhileSL
  simp
  split
  · rename_i h
    have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := h
    simp at hl hr
    subst hl hr
    simp [fromSL, nil, dropWhile]
  · rename_i hne
    push_neg at hne
    split
    · rename_i hhead
      simp [headSL] at hhead
      split at hhead <;> simp at hhead
    · rename_i x hhead
      simp [headSL] at hhead
      split at hhead
      · simp at hhead
      · rename_i heq
        simp at heq hhead
        have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := heq
        subst ha hb
        simp at ok
        cases ok with
        | inl h => simp [h] at hhead
        | inr h =>
          have y :: [] := rhs
          simp at hhead
          subst hhead
          split
          · rename_i hp
            simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp, tailSL, nil, splitInTwoSL]
          · rename_i hp
            simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp]
      · rename_i x' xs' heq
        simp at hhead
        subst hhead
        split
        · rename_i hp
          simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp]
          have : lengthSL (tailSL ⟨x' :: xs', rhs, ok⟩) < lengthSL ⟨x' :: xs', rhs, ok⟩ := by
            apply length_tail_lt_length
            simp [nil]
          conv_rhs => rw [← Function.comp_apply (f := fromSL) (g := dropWhileSL p)]
          have := congrFun (congrArg (fromSL ∘ ·) rfl) (tailSL ⟨x' :: xs', rhs, ok⟩)
          rw [← tailSL]
          simp [tailSL]
          by_cases hxs : xs' = []
          · subst hxs
            simp [splitInTwoSL, fromSL]
            conv_lhs => rw [← Function.comp_apply (f := fromSL) (g := dropWhileSL p)]
            congr 1
            funext sl'
            simp [Function.comp]
          · simp [hxs, fromSL]
            conv_lhs => rw [← Function.comp_apply (f := fromSL) (g := dropWhileSL p)]
            congr 1
            funext sl'
            simp [Function.comp]
        · rename_i hp
          simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp]
termination_by sl.lengthSL

generalize hs : SymList.mk lhs rhs ok = sl'
  induction sl' using SymList.dropWhileSL.induct p generalizing lhs rhs ok with
  | _ => simp_all [dropWhileSL, fromSL, nil, dropWhile, headSL, tailSL]

rw [ih]
          congr 1
          simp [fromSL] at hhead ⊢
          cases lhs with
          | nil =>
            cases rhs with
            | nil => simp at hempty
            | cons y ys => simp at hhead ok; subst hhead; simp [dropWhile, hp, tailSL, nil]
          | cons x xs =>
            simp at hhead; subst hhead
            simp [dropWhile, hp]
            exact congrArg fromSL rfl |> fun _ => by
              have : fromSL (tailSL ⟨x :: xs, rhs, ok⟩) = (fromSL ⟨x :: xs, rhs, ok⟩).tail := by
                simp [fromSL, tailSL]
                by_cases hxs : xs = [] <;> simp [hxs, splitInTwoSL]
              rw [this, fromSL]; simp
        · simp [hp]

induction lhs, rhs, ok using SymList.dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | _ lhs rhs ok hempty => simp [hempty, dropWhileSL, fromSL, nil, dropWhile, List.isEmpty_iff.mp hempty.1, List.isEmpty_iff.mp hempty.2]
  | _ lhs rhs ok hne hnone => simp [headSL_none_iff_nilSL, nil] at hnone; simp [hnone.1, hnone.2] at hne
  | _ lhs rhs ok hne hsome hp ih => simp [dropWhileSL, hne, hsome, hp, ← ih]; sorry
  | _ lhs rhs ok hne hsome hp => simp [dropWhileSL, hne, hsome, hp, fromSL]; sorry

generalize hsl : SymList.mk lhs rhs ok = sl'
  have hlen : lengthSL sl' = lhs.length + rhs.length := by simp [← hsl, lengthSL]
  clear ok hsl
  induction sl' using SymList.dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl hempty =>
    simp [SymList.dropWhileSL, hempty, SymList.nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
  | case2 sl hne hnone =>
    simp [SymList.dropWhileSL, hne, hnone, SymList.nil, fromSL]
    rw [SymList.headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hnone
    simp [hnone, SymList.nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
  | case3 sl hne hsome hsl hp ih =>
    simp only [SymList.dropWhileSL, hne, hsome, hp, ↓reduceIte]
    rw [← ih]
    have heq : List.head? (fromSL sl) = some hsl := by
      have := congrFun (by rfl : List.head? ∘ fromSL = @headSL a) sl
      simp [Function.comp] at this
      rw [this, hsome]
    cases hfrom : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [fromSL] at hfrom; rw [hfrom] at heq; simp at heq
    | cons x xs =>
      simp at heq
      subst heq
      simp [dropWhile, hp]
      have := congrFun (by rfl : ∀ (as : SymList a), fromSL (tailSL as) = tail (fromSL as)) sl
      simp [hfrom, List.tail] at this
      exact this.symm
  | case4 sl hne hsome hsl hnp =>
    simp [SymList.dropWhileSL, hne, hsome, hnp]
    have heq : List.head? (fromSL sl) = some hsl := by
      have := congrFun (by rfl : List.head? ∘ fromSL = @headSL a) sl
      simp [Function.comp] at this
      rw [this, hsome]
    cases hfrom : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [fromSL] at hfrom; rw [hfrom] at heq; simp at heq
    | cons x xs =>
      simp at heq
      subst heq
      simp [dropWhile, hnp]

rw [← ih]
      have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
      simp [fromSL, headSL] at h2 ⊢
      cases lhs with
      | nil =>
        cases rhs with
        | nil => simp at h2
        | cons y ys =>
          simp at ok; subst ok
          simp [dropWhile, h2, tailSL, nil, fromSL]
      | cons x xs =>
        simp [dropWhile, h2, tailSL]
        split_ifs with hxs <;> simp [fromSL, splitInTwoSL]
    · simp [fromSL]
    · have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
      simp [headSL] at h2
      cases lhs <;> cases rhs <;> simp at h2 h1
      simp [fromSL, nil, dropWhile]

generalize hsl : SymList.mk lhs rhs ok = sl'
  have hlen : lengthSL sl' = lhs.length + rhs.length := by simp [← hsl, lengthSL]
  clear ok hsl
  induction sl' using SymList.dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl h =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
  | case2 sl h1 h2 =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
  | case3 sl h1 hd h2 h3 ih =>
    simp only [dropWhileSL, h1, ↓reduceIte, h2, h3]
    have heq : headSL sl = List.head? (fromSL sl) := by
      have ⟨l, r, ok⟩ := sl
      simp [headSL, fromSL]
      split <;> (rename_i h; simp at h; have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := h; subst ha hb; simp)
      simp at ok; simp [ok]
    rw [heq] at h2
    have htl : fromSL (tailSL sl) = (fromSL sl).tail := by
      have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
      cases xs with
      | nil =>
        induction ys with
        | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
        | cons b bs _ =>
          simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]
          simp at ok; rw [ok]; simp
      | cons a as =>
        induction ys with
        | nil => by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
        | cons b bs _ => by_cases h: as = [] <;> simp [h, tailSL, fromSL, splitInTwoSL]
    rw [ih, htl]
    cases hfsl : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [dropWhile]
    | cons x xs =>
      simp [dropWhile, List.head?] at h2 ⊢
      simp [h2, h3]
  | case4 sl h1 hd h2 h3 =>
    simp only [dropWhileSL, h1, ↓reduceIte, h2, h3]
    have heq : headSL sl = List.head? (fromSL sl) := by
      have ⟨l, r, ok⟩ := sl
      simp [headSL, fromSL]
      split <;> (rename_i h; simp at h; have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := h; subst ha hb; simp)
      simp at ok; simp [ok]
    rw [heq] at h2
    cases hfsl : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [dropWhile]
    | cons x xs =>
      simp [dropWhile, List.head?] at h2 ⊢
      simp [h2, h3]

generalize hsl : SymList.mk lhs rhs ok = sl'
  induction sl' using (measure_wf (fun s => lengthSL s)).wf.recursion with
  | _ sl ih =>
    unfold dropWhileSL
    have ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩ := sl
    by_cases hempty : lhs'.isEmpty ∧ rhs'.isEmpty
    · simp [hempty, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
      simp at hempty
      have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hempty
      simp [h1, h2]
    · simp [hempty]
      cases hhead : headSL (SymList.mk lhs' rhs' ok') with
      | none =>
        rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hhead
        simp [nil] at hhead
        have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hhead
        simp [h1, h2] at hempty
      | some hsl =>
        by_cases hp : p hsl
        · simp [hp]
          have hne : SymList.mk lhs' rhs' ok' ≠ nil := by
            intro hc
            rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hc
            rw [hhead] at hc
            contradiction
          have hlt : lengthSL (tailSL (SymList.mk lhs' rhs' ok')) < lengthSL (SymList.mk lhs' rhs' ok') :=
            length_tail_lt_length _ hne
          rw [← ih (tailSL (SymList.mk lhs' rhs' ok')) hlt]
          congr 1
          have heq : fromSL (tailSL (SymList.mk lhs' rhs' ok')) = tail (fromSL (SymList.mk lhs' rhs' ok')) := by
            have h := congrFun (funext fun as => by
              have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := as
              cases xs with
              | nil =>
                induction ys with
                | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
                | cons b bs ih =>
                  simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]
                  simp at *
                  rw [ok]
                  rw [List.reverse_nil, List.nil_append, List.tail]
              | cons a as =>
                induction ys with
                | nil =>
                  by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
                | cons b bs ih =>
                  by_cases h: as = []
                  . simp [h, List.tail, fromSL] at ih
                    simp [h, fromSL, tailSL]
                    simp [splitInTwoSL]
                  . simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]) (SymList.mk lhs' rhs' ok')
            exact h
          rw [heq]
          simp [fromSL] at hhead ⊢
          cases lhs' with
          | nil =>
            simp at ok'
            cases ok' with
            | inl h => simp [h] at hempty
            | inr h =>
              have y :: [] := rhs'
              simp at hhead
              simp [hhead, hp, dropWhile]
          | cons x xs =>
            simp at hhead
            simp [hhead, hp, dropWhile]
        · simp [hp, fromSL]
sorry

induction lhs, rhs using SymList.dropWhileSL.induct p (SymList.mk · · ok) generalizing ok with
  | _ => simp_all [dropWhileSL, fromSL, dropWhile, headSL, tailSL, nil, splitInTwoSL]

simp
  by_cases hemp : lhs.isEmpty ∧ rhs.isEmpty
  · simp [hemp, nil, fromSL]
    have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := hemp
    simp at hl hr
    subst hl hr
    simp [dropWhile]
  · simp [hemp]
    simp [headSL, fromSL]
    cases lhs with
    | nil =>
      simp at ok hemp
      cases rhs with
      | nil => simp at hemp
      | cons y ys =>
        simp at ok
        subst ok
        simp [dropWhile]
        split <;> simp [nil, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
    | cons x xs =>
      simp [dropWhile]
      split
      · have htl : lengthSL (tailSL ⟨x :: xs, rhs, ok⟩) < lengthSL ⟨x :: xs, rhs, ok⟩ := by
          apply length_tail_lt_length
          simp [nil]
        have := ih (tailSL ⟨x :: xs, rhs, ok⟩) htl
        simp [Function.comp] at this
        rw [← this]
        simp [tailSL, fromSL]
        by_cases hxs : xs.length = 1
        · simp [hxs, splitInTwoSL, fromSL]
        · simp [hxs, fromSL]
      · rfl

generalize hsl : SymList.mk lhs rhs ok = sl'
  have hlen : lengthSL sl' = lhs.length + rhs.length := by simp [← hsl, lengthSL]
  clear hsl ok
  induction lhs.length + rhs.length using Nat.strong_induction_on generalizing sl' lhs rhs with
  | ind n ih =>
    have ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩ := sl'
    simp [dropWhileSL, fromSL]
    by_cases hemp : lhs'.isEmpty ∧ rhs'.isEmpty
    · simp [hemp, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
      have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := hemp
      simp at hl hr
      subst hl hr
      simp
    · simp [hemp]
      cases hh : headSL ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩ with
      | none =>
        rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hh
        unfold nil at hh
        simp at hh
        have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hh
        subst h1 h2
        simp at hemp
      | some hd =>
        by_cases hp : p hd
        · simp [hp]
          have hne : ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩ ≠ nil := by
            intro hc
            rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hc
            rw [hc] at hh
            contradiction
          have hlt := length_tail_lt_length ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩ hne
          have htl := tailSL ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩
          have ⟨ltl, rtl, oktl⟩ := htl
          have heq : fromSL (tailSL ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩) = tail (fromSL ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩) := by
            have := congrFun (congrArg fromSL rfl) 
            exact congrFun (funext (fun as => by
              have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := as
              cases xs with
              | nil =>
                induction ys with
                | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
                | cons b bs ih =>
                  simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]
                  simp at *
                  rw [ok]
                  rfl
              | cons a as =>
                induction ys with
                | nil =>
                  by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
                | cons b bs ih =>
                  by_cases h: as = []
                  . simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
                  . simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]
            )) ⟨lhs', rhs', ok'⟩
          rw [heq]
          unfold headSL at hh
          split at hh
          · rename_i heq2; simp at heq2; have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := heq2; subst h1 h2; simp at hemp
          · rename_i y ys heq2; simp at heq2; have ⟨_, h2⟩ := heq2; subst h2
            simp at ok'; simp [ok', fromSL, dropWhile, hp, nil]
          · rename_i x xs heq2
            simp at heq2
            have ⟨h1, h2, h3⟩ := heq2
            subst h1 h2
            injection hh with hh'
            subst hh'
            simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp]
            have hlenlt : lengthSL (tailSL ⟨x :: xs, rhs', ok'⟩) < n := by
              rw [hlen]; exact hlt
            exact ih (lengthSL (tailSL ⟨x :: xs, rhs', ok'⟩)) hlenlt ltl rtl (tailSL ⟨x :: xs, rhs', ok'⟩) rfl
        · simp [hp, fromSL]
          unfold headSL at hh
          split at hh
          · rename_i heq2; simp at heq2; have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := heq2; subst h1 h2; simp at hemp
          · rename_i y ys heq2; simp at heq2; have ⟨_, h2⟩ := heq2; subst h2
            simp at ok'; simp [ok', fromSL, dropWhile, hp]
          · rename_i x xs heq2
            simp at heq2
            have ⟨h1, h2, _⟩ := heq2
            subst h1 h2
            injection hh with hh'
            subst hh'
            simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp]
admit

conv_rhs => unfold dropWhileSL
    simp
    by_cases hemp : lhs.isEmpty ∧ rhs.isEmpty
    · simp [hemp, fromSL, nil, dropWhile]
      simp at hemp
      simp [hemp.1, hemp.2]
    · simp [hemp]
      cases hhead : headSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ with
      | none =>
        rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hhead
        simp [nil] at hhead
        simp [hhead.1, hhead.2] at hemp
      | some hsl =>
        by_cases hp : p hsl
        · simp [hp]
          have hne : ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ ≠ nil := by
            intro hc
            rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hc
            rw [hhead] at hc
            simp at hc
          have hlt := length_tail_lt_length ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ hne
          specialize ih (tailSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) hlt
          simp [Function.comp] at ih
          rw [← ih]
          simp [headSL] at hhead
          split at hhead
          · simp at hhead
          · simp at hhead
            subst hhead
            simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil, splitInTwoSL, dropWhile, hp]
          · simp at hhead
            subst hhead
            cases lhs with
            | nil => simp at *
            | cons x xs =>
              simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp, tailSL]
              by_cases hxs : xs = []
              · simp [hxs, splitInTwoSL, fromSL]
              · simp [hxs, fromSL]
        · simp [hp]

unfold dropWhileSL
    simp
    by_cases hempty : lhs.isEmpty ∧ rhs.isEmpty
    · have ⟨hl, hr⟩ := hempty
      simp at hl hr
      subst hl hr
      simp [fromSL, nil, dropWhile]
    · simp [hempty]
      match hlhs : headSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ with
      | none =>
        rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hlhs
        simp [nil] at hlhs
        have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hlhs
        simp [h1, h2] at hempty
      | some hd =>
        by_cases hp : p hd
        · simp [hp]
          have hne : ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ ≠ nil := by
            intro hc
            rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at hc
            rw [hc] at hlhs
            contradiction
          have hlt := length_tail_lt_length ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ hne
          specialize ih (tailSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) hlt
          simp [Function.comp] at ih
          rw [← ih]
          cases lhs with
          | nil =>
            simp at ok
            cases ok with
            | inl h => simp [h] at hempty
            | inr h =>
              have y :: [] := rhs
              simp [headSL] at hlhs
              subst hlhs
              simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil, dropWhile, hp]
          | cons x xs =>
            simp [headSL] at hlhs
            subst hlhs
            simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp, tailSL]
            by_cases hxs : xs = []
            · simp [hxs, splitInTwoSL]
            · simp [hxs]
        · simp [hp]
          cases lhs with
          | nil =>
            simp at ok
            cases ok with
            | inl h => simp [h] at hempty
            | inr h =>
              have y :: [] := rhs
              simp [headSL] at hlhs
              subst hlhs
              simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp]
          | cons x xs =>
            simp [headSL] at hlhs
            subst hlhs
            simp [fromSL, dropWhile, hp]

induction lhs, rhs, ok using SymList.dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | _ lhs rhs ok hempty => simp [dropWhileSL, hempty, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
  | _ lhs rhs ok hne hnone => simp [headSL_none_iff_nilSL, nil] at hnone; simp [hnone.1, hnone.2] at hne
  | _ lhs rhs ok hne hsome hp ih => simp [dropWhileSL, hne, hsome, hp, ih, fromSL, tailSL, dropWhile, headSL, splitInTwoSL, nil] at *; sorry
  | _ lhs rhs ok hne hsome hp => simp [dropWhileSL, hne, hsome, hp, fromSL, dropWhile, headSL] at *; sorry
